[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A blurry, low-resolution image shows a close-up of a man’s face centered in the frame with overlaid white text across the middle.

Main Subject:
A man is shown from the upper chest up, facing forward. His facial features are indistinct due to blur, with short dark hair and a light-colored complexion. He appears to be wearing a dark top and a light-colored item at the collar area that is unclear.

Setting:
The background looks dark and out of focus, suggesting an indoor or shaded environment, but the exact setting is unclear. The lighting is dim with soft, low-contrast highlights on the face.

Visual Details:
The image has strong blur and pixelation. The man’s face is the brightest area, centered and framed by dark surroundings. White text overlays the image, spanning horizontally across the middle, partially covering the face and upper torso.

Visible Text:
Unclear, but visible white text across the middle reads approximately: "rebalal? Puckik m ll" and "opm...bll?" (exact text unclear due to blur).

Practical Summary:
The image is a blurry close-up portrait of a man against a dark, indistinct background. White overlaid text is visible across the image, but most characters are too unclear to read exactly.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

- “...pak...ed in.”

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
